name: Vior Inc.
summary: Vior Inc., a junior mining exploration company, engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mining properties in North America. The company explores for gold, titanium, silver, zinc, and copper deposits. Its principal properties include the Mosseau project comprising 68 claims for 33 square-kilometers located east of the town of Lebel-sur-Qu√É¬©villon, in the Abitibi region of Quebec; Tonya project covering 71 claims for 501 hectares in the Pershing County, Nevada; and Foothills rutile (titanium dioxide) property that consists of 3 claim blocks covering approximately 49,571 hectares located near the town of Saint-Urbain in Quebec City. The company was formerly known as Soci√É¬©t√É¬© d'Exploration Mini√É¬®re Vior Inc. and changed its name to Vior Inc. in December 2020. Vior Inc. was founded in 1984 and is based in Montr√É¬©al, Canada.
